'''Peet''' was a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in [[Talon Karrde]]'s [[Car'das/Legends|smuggling organization]]. In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], he flew the ''[[Empress' Diadem]]'' under [[Melina Carniss]].

{{Char-stub}}
